CREATE TABLE test_less (a INT, b INT);
SELECT * FROM test_less WHERE a < b;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_less WHERE a < b;
SELECT a, b FROM test_less WHERE a < (SELECT MIN(b) FROM test_less);
SELECT a, b FROM test_less t1 JOIN (SELECT a FROM test_less WHERE b > 2) t2 ON t1.a < t2.a;
SELECT a, b FROM test_less WHERE (a + 1) < (b + 1);
SELECT CASE WHEN a < b THEN 'a is less' ELSE 'a is not less' END AS comparison FROM test_less;
CREATE TABLE test_less2 (a INT, b INT, c INT);
SELECT a FROM test_less2 WHERE a < (SELECT AVG(b) FROM test_less2);
SELECT DISTINCT t1.a FROM test_less t1 JOIN test_less2 t2 ON t1.a < t2.c;
SELECT *, a < b AS less_than FROM test_less;
WITH temp AS (SELECT a, b FROM test_less WHERE a < b) SELECT * FROM temp;
SELECT a FROM test_less WHERE a < b AND (a % 2 = 0);
SELECT a, b FROM test_less WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_less2 WHERE a < b);
